zh.lifeSummary: Joanna Swanlland是Sir William Swanland和Joanna Blachworth的女兒，於1360年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾斯萬藍德。她於大約1379年與John de Newdigate在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1445年在英國英格蘭米德萊可哈利費爾德享年85歲。

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

en.lifeSummary: Joanna Swanlland was born in 1360, in Swanland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir William Swanland and Joanna Blachworth. She married John de Newdigate about 1379, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1445, in Harefield, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 85.

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Swanlland(은)는 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스완랜드에서 Sir William Swanland(와)과 Joanna Blachworth의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1379년 영국 잉글랜드에서 John de Newdigate(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 하레필드에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Joanna Swanlland родилась в 1360 г. в местности сванланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Sir William Swanland и Joanna Blachworth. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Newdigate около 1379 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1445 г. в местности харефиелд, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 85 лет.
